topics: Definition and significance of soft computing

Differences between hard and soft computing, Introduction to Fuzzy Logic: Fuzzy Sets and Membership Functions, Fuzzy Rules and Inference Systems. Introduction to genetic algorithms-Working Principle, Operators: Selection, crossover, and mutation. Introduction to neural networks, Learning rules and various activation functions, Single layer Perceptrons multilayer perceptrons, Backpropagation algorithm, Architecture
Industrial Machine Vision Basic concepts of image formation: Radiometry and geometric transformations. Geometric Camera Models

Pinhole camera model,Perspective projection and camera parameters. Techniques for 3D reconstruction. Spatial domain and Frequency domain methods for image enhancement. Image Segmentation: Thresholding., Region
K-Means, Mixture of Gaussians, Classification: Discriminant Function, Supervised, Un-supervised, Semi-supervised

Dimensionality Reduction: PCA, LDA, ICA Vision algorithms: Vision algorithms for identifying end wires- binary vision algorithm, grey-scale vision algorithm, active ranging using structured light technique in industrial vision
